originalTitle: Cathie Wood sells $8.7 million of tumbling AI stock
summary: Cathie Wood, head of Ark Investment Management, is known for making bold bets on disruptive tech companies. Yet Wood recently reduced one of her favorite investments, Palantir, after the stock fell roughly 28% year to date. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%, far outpacing the ...

chineseTitle: Cathie Wood 出售价值 870 万美元的 AI 股票
chineseSummary: 方舟投资管理公司 (Ark Investment Management) 主管凯西·伍德 (Cathie Wood) 以大胆押注颠覆性科技公司而闻名。然而，伍德最近减少了她最喜欢的投资之一 Palantir，因为该股今年迄今下跌了约 28%。 2025年，旗舰方舟创新ETF上涨35.49%，远超...

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
